title: Croc'Odor Fridge Deodoriser, Twin Pack, Unscented, Food Safe Formular with Temperature Indicator - 2 x 33 g, Packaging may vary
features: Neutralizes odours: Love smelly cheeses? So do we! But nobody wants there whole fridge to smell like our favourite dairy delight. Using a Croc Odor will absorb odours herefore, reducing cross contamination, leaving your food tasting better and more fresh.
Protects flavours : By preventing cross contamination, you no longer need to worry about the smelly cheese, garlic or onion affecting other produce in the fridge.
Natural Seaweed: To absorb those smelly odours Croc Odor contains natural seaweed extracts. It is also a food safe formula that lasts up to six weeks.
Intelligent design : Developed with efficiency in mind Croc Odor is the perfect size for the average fridge and tells you if the fridge temperature exceeds the recommended 5 degrees celcius.
description: Product Description Control the odour of stronger smelling foods like fish, cheese and onion Ingredients Preservation agents: Methylisothiazolinone; Octylisothiazolinone
